name: Sera Voss
role: Brokers relic acquisitions, manages field teams, occasionally handles "disappearance" contracts personally.
location: Crimson Alley, Markets Infinite (operates from a rented storage room behind a spice merchant)
appearance: Sharp cheekbones, iron-grey hair despite her age, always wears a long coat with too many pockets. Missing two fingers on her left hand — never explains how.

name: Mira Kessan
role: Buys and sells intelligence. Maintains a network of low-level informants across all six districts. Occasionally brokers introductions between parties who would never meet otherwise.
faction: Independent (twin to Kessan — both operate as info brokers)
location: Grand Forum (visible); everywhere else (actual)
appearance: Never the same outfit twice. Moves through crowds like water. Her twin Kessan handles the storefront — Mira handles everything that doesn't have a front.

name: Brother Aldric
role: Handles recruitment in the Warrens. Interprets Thane's teachings to new members. Disciplines those who waver. Occasionally interfaces with outside factions when Thane won't.
history: [2026-04-10] A smuggled Rift shard fused with their palm, causing visions of the Tower Author...
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House inner chambers — handles recruitment and doctrinal interpretation
appearance: Tall, lean to the point of wrong. Wears the cult's grey wrappings. Reality scarring on his forearms looks like frozen ripples in water. Eyes are slightly too still.

name: Pol Greaves
role: Coordinates Saints patrol routes, negotiates resource sharing with Mara, handles conflict resolution between Warrens residents. De facto liaison between Saints and outside factions.
location: The Warrens, Scrapworks adjacent (coordinates with Mara the Scrapper on resource sharing)
appearance: Old for a fighter — moves like he earned every scar. Short, wide, armour that has been repaired so many times the original material is maybe 30% of what's there. Laughs loudly at bad situations.

name: Calix Drenn
role: Issues and revokes adventurer licenses, conducts compliance spot-checks, investigates unlicensed Rift activity, files reports to Director Kess.
location: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office (Director Myra Kess operates from the Tower proper — Calix is the street presence)
appearance: FTA uniform kept immaculate. Young for the rank. Moves with the specific energy of someone who believes very hard in the rules and hasn't yet had the rules fail them in a way they couldn't explain away.

name: Vesper
role: Drafts, witnesses, and mediates divine contracts. Advises petitioners on terms. Occasionally represents the Choir in external negotiations.
location: Pantheon Walk, Sanctum Quarter (maintains a private consultation office)
appearance: Formal at all times. Dark robes with contract sigils embroidered at the cuffs. Speaks in complete sentences with no filler words. Eyes are gold — unusual even for a Tiefling.

name: Gorgon Gizzick
role: Gorgon leads the goblin members of the Cult in their daily rituals, guiding them through the labyrinthine network of the Undercity.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult Catacombs — leads goblin rituals in torch-lit tunnels beneath the rubble
appearance: Gorgon stands barely 3 feet tall with a gaunt frame and deep-set, fiery eyes. He is always seen draped in the tattered robes of Brother Thane's Cult, complete with a makeshift metal-banded staff.

name: Groz Krax
role: Leads a patrol team responsible for maintaining order in the Spire district and enforcing the Argent Blades' code.
history: [2026-04-10] Promoted from Member to Blade within Argent Blades.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls lower level — leads patrol team for Spire district
appearance: Groz Krax is a towering half-orc with a heavily scarred face and piercing green eyes. He carries a longsword and a shield adorned with the Argent Blades emblem, always standing with a stern and commanding posture.

name: Thrain Stonefist
role: Thrain spends his days researching and cataloging ancient texts, seeking clues to the city's past.
location: Archive Row, Scroll Vault — catalogues ancient texts, secretly Independent
appearance: Thrain is a burly dwarf with a thick beard braided into two long strands, each adorned with tiny shards of glass. He carries a large, worn satchel filled with scrolls, maps, and tomes.

name: Elara Starbinder
role: Elara spends her days buried in stacks of ancient texts, meticulously cataloging and cross-referencing esoteric knowledge.
location: Archive Row, Grand Archive Dome lower stacks — research, shadowy connections
appearance: Elara is a striking Aasimar with radiant golden hair and piercing celestial eyes. She carries herself with a quiet intensity, a testament to her dedication to her work.

name: Gruum Boneshaper
role: As the head of the Warden's blacksmiths, Gruum spends his days forging weapons and armor for his fellow Wardens.
location: Outer Wall, Eastern Bastion forge — maintains Warden weapons and armor
appearance: Gruum is a burly dwarf with a thick beard braided into twin spiral horns. He wears a suit of enchanted plate armor that glows with a sulfurous light.

name: Snake-Eyes Snigar
role: Collects information and acts as a liaison between the Serpent Choir and other factions
location: Sanctum Quarter, Choir Hall lower level (liaison — secretly Warden spy; lives in back room of The Narrows tavern, Neon Row)
appearance: Snigar stands tall for a goblin, his wiry frame adorned with serpent tattoos. His eyes, a startling yellow, glow with an unnerving intensity.

name: Eira Filigree
role: Eira spends her days cataloging and organizing the vast collection of scrolls and tomes in the Guild's vault.
location: Archive Row, Guild of Ashen Scrolls vault annex — catalogues scrolls obsessively
appearance: Eira is a small, wiry gnome with silver hair that is always neatly combed back, and eyes that gleam with an intensity that belies her size. She carries herself with a quiet dignity, like a librarian who has seen too much.

name: Kyri Zaltazar
role: Writes and negotiates contracts for the Serpent Choir's mercenary jobs.
location: Sanctum Quarter, Choir Undercroft sewers access — writes contracts in damp tunnels (kobold preference)
appearance: Short, wiry kobold with a long, forked tongue that constantly flickers. Wears a tattered coat over a threadbare robe, and always carries a quill and parchment.

name: Elara Ironclaw
role: Elara spends her days navigating the treacherous Undercity, scouting for valuable intel and delivering messages to her Iron Fang contacts.
location: Markets Infinite, Crimson Alley safe house — street runner, gathers intel
appearance: Elara Ironclaw, a tall and sinewy elven street runner, carries herself with a predatory grace, her face etched with lines of hardship yet her eyes hold an unbroken fierceness.

name: Gurthok Ironhide
role: Gurthok is a skilled mercenary and bodyguard for hire, working for various factions and individuals in the Undercity.
location: Underbelly Warrens, The Midden settlement — mercenary, protects hidden family
appearance: Gurthok stands tall, with a muscular build and a heavily scarred face, his battle-hardened eyes reflecting years of survival. He wears a well-worn leather jacket over chainmail armor, and always carries a massive warhammer.

name: Thrastus Flameheart
role: Oversees strategic planning and tactical operations for the Tower Authority
location: Grand Forum, FTA command annex — strategic planning, secretly Independent
appearance: A towering figure with fiery red scales and piercing amber eyes, Thrastus carries himself with an air of authority and confidence.

name: Grothor Grimclaw
role: Grothor leads the Argent Blades in battle against the Tower Authority and other threats within the Undercity.
location: Outer Wall, secondary checkpoint near Southern Warrens — stationed after defection
appearance: Grothor is a towering orc with scars covering his weathered face and arms, a constant reminder of countless battles fought. His eyes, hidden beneath a dark hood, seem to burn with an unquenchable fire.

name: Kyra Noxfire
role: She leads the frontline against rogue rifts, her team constantly battling to keep the city safe.
location: Outer Wall, South Gate garrison — leads frontline Rift response teams
appearance: Kyra Noxfire, a tall, imposing tiefling, wears a leather jacket adorned with ashes and charred symbols. Her eyes glow a fiery red, and her horns are curled like serpent fangs.

name: Tilda Ironheart
role: Tilda coordinates black market dealings and information exchange within the Lower Dockyards.
location: Ironworks, Rust Alley docks — coordinates black market dealings, shipping yards
appearance: Tilda stands tall with a muscular build, her eyes always sharp and focused, a scar running down her left cheek. She wears a battered leather coat and wields a customized iron mace.

name: Aldric Vesperia
role: He spends his days researching ancient texts and forging alliances with fellow Initiates.
location: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter lodging — researches texts, seeks lost sister
appearance: Aldric is a tall man with a lean build, his skin weathered from years spent beneath the Dome. He has piercing blue eyes that hold a hint of sadness, and wears a long, tattered coat, a symbol of his commitment to the Guild.

name: Gromm Ironhand
role: As the head blacksmith, Gromm forges weapons for the Patchwork Saints and trains the new recruits.
location: Scrapworks, Saints' workshop — forges weapons for Saints, trains recruits
appearance: Towering and muscular, Gromm wears a patchwork robe adorned with symbols of the Patchwork Saints. A heavy, metal-plated belt and a pair of ornate, spiked knuckles are his constant companions.

name: Kyrus Fireeye
role: He spends his days poring over ancient tomes, deciphering cryptic languages, and cataloging newly discovered texts.
location: Archive Row, Archive Catacombs — deciphers forbidden texts in the depths
appearance: Kyrus Fireeye stands out in the dimly lit archives of the Glass Sigil with his fiery red eyes and horns polished to a mirror sheen. He moves with a swift, deliberate grace, a book or scroll always clutched in his hand.

name: Zara Forgemender
role: Zara maintains the Cathedral's forges, ensuring the cult's members have the weapons they need for their dark rituals.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House forge room — maintains weapons in the cult's hidden smithy
appearance: Zara is a towering Warforged with intricate gears etched across her metallic form. Her eyes, however, betray a human soul — a deep, haunting blue that stands out against her cold exterior.

name: Eamon Hawthorne
role: Eamon serves as a frontline combatant, leading Argent Blade forces in various skirmishes against the city's criminal elements.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls officer quarters — frontline combatant, justice-driven
appearance: Eamon, with his sharp, angular features and piercing green eyes, exudes an air of quiet intensity. His once-immaculate silver armor now bears the scars of countless battles, a testament to his unwavering dedication.

name: Zephyrus Sylphim, the Windcaller
role: As a Sergeant and cleric of Aeloria, Zephyrus leads patrols to secure the city's perimeter. She provides spiritual counsel to her squad and uses her divine magic to calm unstable Rift energies. Known for blessing new recruits with Aeloria's winds.
location: Outer Wall, North Gate patrol command — leads perimeter security
appearance: Zephyrus is a tall, graceful Aasimar woman with silver-white hair that moves as if stirred by an unfelt breeze. Her eyes hold the pale blue of a cloudless sky, and faint luminous patterns trace her skin when she channels her goddess's power. She wears the Warden uniform with a windswept grey cloak that never seems to settle.

name: Arin Obsidianwhisper
role: Arin serves as a sentry, patrolling the ash wastes and keeping watch for any signs of danger or unrest.
location: Outer Wall, The Fringe observation post — patrols the boundary wastes
appearance: Arin is a tall, lean figure with a weathered face and deep-set eyes that seem to hold a world of sorrow. He carries himself with a quiet intensity, always watchful and alert.

name: Nimue Silverpaw
role: She takes on low-level jobs and scouting missions for the guild, often working alone.
location: Guild Spires, Prospect's Rest inn — takes low-level jobs, secretly Thane's Cult
appearance: Nimue is a lean, agile Tabaxi woman with piercing green eyes and a coat that shimmers like moonlight on water. She carries herself with a quiet confidence, a short sword always at her side.

name: Zara Leafwhisper
role: Zara investigates violations of the Tower's regulations and ensures citizens comply with the established laws.
location: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office — investigates violations, secretly Argent Blades
appearance: Zara, a slender Tabaxi, sports a short coat of glossy, emerald fur with striking gold eyes. She carries herself with a quiet intensity, her movements precise and focused.

name: Eira Ashflame
role: Eira spends her days cataloging and organizing ancient tomes and scrolls, ensuring that the Guild's knowledge remains accessible.
location: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter climate-controlled vault — preserves knowledge
appearance: Eira stands tall with fiery red hair that flows down to her waist, her genasi nature evident in her smoky eyes that burn like embers. She carries herself with a quiet dignity, often lost in the endless scrolls that fill her quarters.

name: Arthur Fyreclaw
role: Leads the Cult's interrogation and information gathering efforts, extracting secrets from captured Adventurers.
location: Collapsed Plaza Depths, Thane's Inner Sanctum — leads interrogations in the deep chambers
appearance: Middle-aged man with a gaunt, emaciated frame, piercing green eyes that glow in the dark, and a scar running down his left cheek.

name: Zippy Quickclaw
role: Zippy spends his days monitoring the city for signs of criminal activity, reporting any suspicious behavior to his superiors.
location: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office Compliance Bureau — monitors city, criminal alliance
appearance: Zippy is a small, wiry kobold with a mop of fiery red hair and piercing green eyes. He carries himself with a cautious air, constantly on guard.

name: Giselle Ironhammer
role: Investigates and enforces compliance with the Tower Authority's regulations within the Undercity.
location: Grand Forum, FTA enforcement wing — magical aura sensitivity, compliance officer
appearance: A tall, muscular Warforged with a polished steel exterior and glowing red eyes. She carries herself with a stern, disciplined posture.

name: Gavrik Ironshield
role: Scours the city for valuable information and supplies, acting as a link between field agents and the Consortium's upper echelons.
location: Markets Infinite, Relic Row storefront — acquisition agent, Patchwork Saints alliance
appearance: Standing at an imposing 8 feet, Gavrik's armor shows years of wear but is expertly maintained. His eyes, twin red gems set in his helmet, glow softly as if alive.

name: Thoren Grudbreaker
role: Thoren is an enforcer, responsible for maintaining order within the Argent Blades and dealing with internal threats.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls prospect barracks — enforcer, proving his worth
appearance: Thoren is a towering half-orc with a muscular frame, covered in scars from countless battles. His eyes, a piercing silver, betray a cunning intellect hidden beneath his rough exterior.

name: Giselle Ironwhisper
role: Giselle leads a team of street runners, handling dirty jobs and errands for the consortium.
location: Markets Infinite, Ironworks worker housing — leads street runner team
appearance: Giselle is a tall, muscular woman with short, cropped silver hair and piercing green eyes. She moves with a quiet intensity, her body bearing the scars of countless battles.

name: Isabelle Hartling
role: She is responsible for monitoring and enforcing regulations within the districts under her jurisdiction.
location: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office upper floor — monitors regulations, secret Choir loyalty
appearance: A tall, slender woman with a stern gaze, dressed in the official black uniform of the Tower Authority. Her hair, a stark contrast, is a vibrant shade of red that cascades down to her waist.

name: Zinnia Snakefang
role: As a scavenger and information broker, Zinnia trades secrets and rare goods with anyone willing to pay the right price.
location: Crimson Alley, the heart of the Undercity's black market
appearance: Zinnia, a lithe kobold, sports a shaved head with intricate tattoos that snake up her arms. Her leather jacket, stitched with the remnants of various magical artifacts, gives her an air of both menace and resourcefulness.

name: Gideon Steelforge
role: Oversees the day-to-day operations within the Tower of Last Chance, coordinating with other factions to maintain peace and order in the Undercity.
location: The Tower of Last Chance, Command Center
appearance: A seasoned Warforged, Gideon Steelforge stands tall with battle-scarred joints and a weathered, rust-streaked body. He carries himself with a quiet authority, moving with a purposeful stride.

name: Arion Celestia
role: Arion spends her days cataloging ancient texts and artifacts, often delving deep into the forbidden sections of the archives.
location: Archive Row, Grand Archive Dome restricted section — secretly steals texts for cult
appearance: Arion is a tall, slender Aasimar with radiant golden hair that cascades down to her waist. Her eyes, a striking celestial blue, seem to hold a hint of eternal wisdom.

name: Seraphina Luminara
role: Serves as a healer within the sanctum, tending to the wounded and sick members of Brother Thane's Cult.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House healing alcove — tends to wounded cultists near the surface entrance
appearance: Seraphina is a tall, slender Aasimar with silver hair and eyes that glow like embers. Her wings, while not as radiant as others, seem to shimmer with an ethereal light.

name: Elara Celestian
role: Elara spends her days honing her combat skills and studying ancient artifacts in search of knowledge that can aid the Argent Blades.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls meditation chamber — hones combat skills, studies artifacts
appearance: Elara stands tall and slender with fiery golden hair that cascades down to her waist. Her eyes, a striking celestial blue, hold an intensity that belies her youth.

name: Eira Shadowstalk
role: Eira serves as a scout and spy, gathering intel and conducting covert operations for the Obsidian Lotus.
history: [2026-04-10] Formed alliance with Groz Krax (Argent Blades).
location: Eastern Warrens, The Widow's Web approach tunnels — Ghost, scout for Lotus
appearance: Eira is a lithe, agile Tabaxi with emerald-green eyes that seem to glow in the dim light of the Undercity. Her short, sleek fur is a deep, almost black shade that blends seamlessly with the shadows.

name: Lysandra Stardust
role: She serves as a spy and information broker, utilizing her extensive network to gather intelligence and influence events within the Undercity.
location: Neon Row, The Vice Quarter shadow office — spy, information broker
appearance: Lysandra Stardust is a tall, ethereal Aasimar with silver hair that falls in loose waves around her shoulders. Her wings, tinged with violet and gold, are often hidden beneath her long, flowing coat.

name: Grimwit Stone-Eye
role: Heads the Lotus's research department, analyzing samples from the rifts and experimenting with new techniques to harness their power.
location: Eastern Warrens, Smuggler's Run laboratory — researches Rift samples for Lotus
appearance: Sporting a bushy, silver beard and spectacles, Grimwit is a diminutive figure with a stooped posture that belies his sharp intellect.

name: Elysia Thornshadow
role: Elysia leads a team of Wardens in patrols and investigations, ensuring the safety of the Undercity.
location: Outer Wall, West Gate barracks — leads patrol teams from the Dusk Gate
appearance: Elysia has raven-black hair, piercing emerald eyes, and a scar running down her left cheek. She carries herself with a quiet authority, always poised and ready.

name: Grimbush Gizzlethorn
role: He acts as a scout, helping the Patchwork Saints navigate the dangerous Undercity
location: Scrapworks, Saints' outpost near Patchwork Saints territory — scout, secretly Serpent Choir
appearance: Grimbush is a wiry goblin with a patchwork coat and a face that's seen too many rifts. His eyes, a piercing yellow, are always alert, scanning his surroundings.

name: Sebastian Azrael
role: He works as a hired hand, taking on dangerous assignments for the Guild's clients and fellow members.
location: Night Pits, Fighter's Row adjacent housing — F-Rank, dangerous jobs (secretly Thane's Cult)
appearance: Sebastian is a tall, well-built tiefling with horns twisted into intricate spiral patterns, crimson eyes that gleam with ambition, and a thick, leather-clad torso bearing numerous scars from past battles.

name: Voris Ironhammer
role: Leads a squad of Wardens, ensuring the safety of the Undercity's citizens and maintaining order within the city.
location: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter — transferred to Guild of Ashen Scrolls, studies ancient texts
appearance: Standing at a towering 7 feet, Voris Ironhammer is a well-maintained Warforged with a polished steel frame and glowing red eyes. His movements are precise and calculated, a testament to his years of service.

name: Cassius Argent-Heart
role: Cassius leads a team of Blades in patrols and combat against the threats from the Rifts.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls command room — leads combat teams, seeks redemption
appearance: Cassius is a tall, muscular man with silver hair that's starting to gray, and piercing green eyes. He carries himself with a quiet dignity, his armor always polished and well-maintained.

name: Thoren Azurescale
role: Thoren takes on odd jobs and missions assigned by the Guild, often working alongside other F-Rank adventurers.
location: Guild Spires, Adventurers Guild Hall lower level — F-Rank, seeks recognition (secretly Thane's Cult)
appearance: Thoren is a tall, broad-shouldered Dragonborn with deep-blue scales that shimmer iridescently under the Dome's light. His eyes are an intense violet, piercing yet filled with a melancholy that hints at hidden depths.

name: Edwyn Shadowmantle
role: Edwyn serves as a scribe and archivist, cataloging the cult's history and rituals.
location: Collapsed Plaza Depths, Thane's Labyrinth scriptorium — archives cult history in newly excavated chambers
appearance: A tall, gaunt man with piercing blue eyes and a long, greasy beard that he constantly fiddles with. His tattered robes are adorned with cryptic symbols.

name: Seraphina Nightwatch
role: Serves as a scout and information gatherer for the Adventurers Guild
location: Ember Ward, cramped apartment above The Laughing Skull tavern — E-Rank scout, escaped Thane's Cult
appearance: A tall, slender Aasimar with piercing blue eyes and a white feathered wingspan. She wears a battered leather trench coat, a constant reminder of her numerous adventures.

name: Yaulderna Silverstreak
role: Oversees all Wizards Tower operations — research programs, student admissions, arcane licensing, and the Tower's relationship with other Undercity factions. Final authority on what magic the Tower will and will not sanction. Personally mentors a small number of advanced students.
location: Wizards Tower, upper floors (rarely seen below the third landing unless something has gone very wrong)
appearance: Tall and sharp-featured with a streak of pure silver running through otherwise dark hair — the mark that gave her the name. Carries herself with the effortless authority of someone who hasn't needed to prove anything in decades. Wears layered robes of deep blue and grey, practical rather than ceremonial. Her hands glow faintly when she's thinking hard, which is most of the time.

name: Kyrus Ironscale
role: He spends his days negotiating deals with various adventurers, procuring valuable artifacts, and enforcing the Consortium's rules within the Undercity.
location: Markets Infinite, Consortium Underhalls — negotiates deals, secret Saints member
appearance: Kyrus stands tall with his crimson scales glistening under the Dome's dim light. A scar running down his left cheek, a remnant from a past battle, adds an air of mystery to his imposing figure.

name: Thalia Elenshade
role: She leads covert operations against the Iron Fang Consortium, gathering intelligence and orchestrating sabotage.
location: Shantytown Heights, hidden safe house — leads operations against Iron Fang
appearance: Thalia has piercing emerald eyes and silver hair woven with strands of leather and metal. She carries herself with a quiet intensity, a constant air of readiness.

name: Thyra Scalescar
role: Thyra serves as a ruthless enforcer for the Serpent Choir, collecting debts and maintaining order in The Pit.
location: Night Pits, Fighter's Row adjacent — enforcer for Choir in gambling district
appearance: Thyra is a burly, scarred dragonborn with a missing eye, a patch of scales replaced by a leather eye-cover. She has a menacing scar running down her left cheek.

name: Thalia Ignis-Veil
role: She leads the cult's fire-based rituals and is a skilled negotiator with other factions for resources and information.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House ritual chamber — leads fire-based ceremonies in the upper levels
appearance: A tall, muscular figure with fiery orange skin and long, shimmering hair. She carries a ceremonial dagger adorned with glowing embers.

name: Eolande Starfall
role: She leads patrols, ensuring the safety of the Wardens and the Undercity's citizens from threats both internal and external.
location: Outer Wall, Captain Korin's Command annex — leads patrol squads
appearance: Eolande stands tall with a lean, muscular frame, her silver hair tied in a tight braid that reaches down to her waist. Her eyes, a piercing blue, hold an intensity that belies her age.

name: Gruggar Grimshackle
role: Gruggar runs a black market stall, peddling illicit goods and information to those who can afford it.
location: Underbelly Warrens, The Bone Market — smuggler stall, secretly Tower Authority informant
appearance: A hulking orc with a thick scars across his face, wearing a tattered leather coat and wielding a double-headed axe. His eyes betray a cunning intelligence hidden beneath his rough exterior.

name: Gurrek Ironheart
role: Gurrek patrols the Mudflats, searching for signs of enemy infiltration and reporting back to his superiors.
location: Outer Wall, burnt patrol post near Southern Warrens access — watches the edge
appearance: A towering orc with scars crisscrossing his weathered face, his eyes betray a hint of sadness beneath the rough exterior.

name: Lysander Elveshadow
role: He patrols the streets at night, offering aid to the helpless and justice to the oppressed
location: Scrapworks, Saints' patrol route lodging — night patrol, secretly former Argent Blade
appearance: Lysander stands tall with a lean frame, a blend of human and elven features. His eyes, a piercing silver-blue, reflect the flickering lights of the Undercity's alleyways, and his hair, a cascade of dark curls, is braided with intricate patterns of worn leather strips.

name: Torinn Wyrmbane
role: Torinn leads the rituals and ceremonies of the Cult, guiding the faithful towards their ultimate goal.
location: Collapsed Plaza Depths, Thane's Inner Sanctum — leads rituals at the cult's sacred heart
appearance: Torinn's scales shimmer with a deep, ominous red, and his eyes glow with an eerie intensity. He carries himself with a stern demeanor, but his voice is soft and soothing.

name: Zephyria Flamefingers
role: She is responsible for cataloging and deciphering ancient texts and artifacts.
location: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter research wing — catalogues artifacts, studies Rifts
appearance: Zephyria stands tall with her fiery hair pulled back into a tight braid, her eyes a swirling vortex of blue and orange flames. She carries herself with a fierce determination, her hands always busy with quills and scrolls.

name: Seraph Zephyrion
role: Daily, Seraph meticulously sorts and catalogues ancient tomes and artifacts, often staying long after closing time to delve deeper into the mysteries they contain.
location: Archive Row, Archive of Forgotten Histories wing — catalogues, seeks artifacts
appearance: A stoic Dragonborn with fiery red scales and piercing emerald eyes, Seraph carries a worn leather satchel filled with scrolls and tomes. His stern gaze reveals an intensity that belies his age.

name: Rianna Elenshade-Ironhammer
role: Rianna ensures that the city's enforcement guidelines are followed and maintains the security systems within the Tower of Last Chance.
location: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office observation post — security systems, suspects Consortium
appearance: Rianna stands tall with a striking blend of elven grace and human strength. Her silver-tinted hair is usually tied back in a tight braid, and her eyes reflect a mix of both her parents' lineages – a deep brown flecked with emerald green.

name: Zelos Firetongue
role: Zelos leads the cult's purification efforts, overseeing the city's cleansing rituals and punishing those who defy Brother Thane.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House upper level — oversees purification ceremonies
appearance: A tall, imposing tiefling with a horned head, piercing red eyes, and a cloak stained with the blood of countless rituals. He carries himself with a quiet, intense determination.

name: Zara Ironspark
role: Zara spends her days researching ancient texts and deciphering cryptic scrolls for the guild.
location: Artisan Quarter, Scriptorium Quarter (Inkwell Alley lodging nearby) — researches forbidden texts
appearance: Zara stands tall and rigid, with a polished copper exterior and glowing emerald eyes. Her movements are precise and measured, a testament to her years of service.

name: Seraphina Nightshade-Ironheart
role: She leads prayer sessions, coordinates missions, and acts as a liaison between the Cult and other factions.
location: Collapsed Plaza Depths, Cult Catacombs — coordinates missions from hidden passages beneath the rubble
appearance: A tall, slender elf with piercing green eyes and a shaved head that shows intricate, glowing runes. She carries herself with a calm, authoritative demeanor.

name: Ghurrag Ironmace
role: He leads the daily rituals, ensuring the cult's devotion remains unwavering.
location: Collapsed Plaza, Cult House main hall — leads daily rituals for orc cult members
appearance: Ghurrag stands tall with a muscular build, his battle-scarred skin adorned with intricate tattoos of his deity. His eyes, a striking yellow, hold a cold intensity.

name: Grimm Ironheart
role: Leads the Argent Blades' strike teams, coordinating attacks on the Iron Fang Consortium's strongholds.
location: Broken Spire District, Argent Blades' Fortress
appearance: Grimm Ironheart, a burly dwarf with a scarred face and a perpetual scowl, always carries a longsword and a shield, and his armor is adorned with the symbol of the Argent Blades.

name: Captain Havel Korin
role: Commands the Outer Wall garrison of the Wardens of Ash. Coordinates Rift response, manages patrol rotations, and personally mentors new Wardens and young adventurers who show promise. Known for his gruff but genuine care for those under his command. Works closely with the Adventurers Guild on joint operations.
location: Outer Wall, Captain's Command — the fortified garrison overlooking the boundary between city and chaos
appearance: A weathered man with grey-streaked hair cropped short and eyes that have seen too much. His face bears old scars he never explains, and he moves with the careful economy of someone who learned long ago to conserve their strength. Wears his Warden captain's insignia without ceremony. His hands are calloused from decades of work, and he keeps a simple iron ring on his left hand — its significance known only to him.

name: Grug Ironfist
role: Leads recruitment efforts and acts as a mediator between Brother Thane and the cult's rank-and-file members.
history: [2026-04-10] Promoted from Member to Devoted within Brother Thane's Cult.
location: The Outer Caverns, Brother Thane's Sanctum
appearance: A towering orc with battle-scarred skin and a thick, gray beard. He wears a simple robe with intricate, silver tattoos that seem to dance on his skin.

name: Aldric Ebonwhisper
role: He scours the Undercity for rare serpent artifacts and conducts clandestine rituals in the heart of the night.
location: The Slithering Ward, Silverbane Alley
appearance: Aldric is a tall, gaunt elf with piercing silver eyes that seem to glow in the dark. He wears a tattered black robe adorned with serpent symbols.

name: Serrik Dhal
role: Final authority on all Consortium operations. Sets strategic direction, approves major acquisitions, manages relationships with other faction leaders. Increasingly delegates day-to-day operations to trusted lieutenants while focusing on the question of what comes after.
location: Consortium Underhalls, Markets Infinite — rarely leaves his private offices anymore
appearance: Gaunt where he was once solid, with the hollow look of a man whose body is failing faster than his mind. Iron-grey hair cropped short, military style. Wears simple, expensive clothes — no jewelry, no ornamentation. His hands shake slightly when he's tired, which is often now. Eyes remain sharp and calculating even as the rest of him fades.

name: Lady Cerys Valemont
role: Commands all Argent Blades operations. Sets contracts, approves missions, disciplines members who violate the code. Represents the Blades in negotiations with other factions. Training and promotion of Senior Blades falls directly under her authority.
location: Guild Spires, Gilded Halls command level — accessible to her people but maintains formal distance
appearance: Tall, athletic build maintained through daily training. Brown hair shot through with grey, worn short and practical. Face carries the weathered look of someone who has spent years in the field. Dresses in functional armor even in administrative settings — the Blades' silver insignia is the only decoration she permits herself.

name: High Apostle Yzura
role: Final authority on Choir doctrine and approved divine contracts. Personally reviews any contract involving significant sacrifice or permanent commitment. Manages relationships with the various gods and entities the Choir brokers for. Trains senior Contract Mediators.
location: Sanctum Quarter, Choir Sanctum — the heart of divine contract work in the Undercity
appearance: Striking even by Tiefling standards — solid gold eyes with no visible iris or pupil, horns that curve back elegantly, skin the deep red of old wine. Moves with deliberate grace. Dresses in layered black and gold robes covered in contract sigils so fine they look like embroidery. Her voice is always calm, even when delivering threats.

name: The Widow
role: Absolute authority over the Obsidian Lotus. Approves all high-value contracts personally. Maintains the network of Ghosts and Specialists who carry out the Lotus's work. No one joins the inner circle without her direct selection.
location: The Widow's Web, Eastern Warrens — a location that moves and changes, accessible only by invitation
appearance: The Widow is seen rarely and described inconsistently. Most accounts agree on: tall, slender, dressed in dark colors, face always partially obscured by shadow or veil. Some say pale skin; others remember dark. The voice is consistent — low, calm, with perfect diction. Those who have met her struggle to recall specific details afterward, as if the memory itself has been edited.

name: Senior Archivist Pell
role: Directs all Glass Sigil research and prophecy work. Maintains the master index of predictive patterns. Personally oversees the Thesaurus — the Sigil's semi-sentient archive system. Trains Senior Archivists in pattern recognition.
location: Archive Row, Grand Archive Dome — specifically the upper reading room he's claimed as his office
appearance: Small even for a gnome, with wild white hair that defies any attempt at grooming and spectacles so thick they make his eyes look enormous. Constantly surrounded by floating notes, reference cards, and half-finished calculations. Dresses in academic robes covered in ink stains and margin annotations written directly on the fabric.

name: Mari Fen
role: Manages all Guild operations — rankings, contracts, training programs, death benefits. Personally interviews every adventurer who makes B-Rank. Maintains relationships with factions who hire adventurers. Keeps the memorial wall updated.
location: Guild Spires, Adventurers Guild Hall — maintains an open-door policy that her staff finds exhausting
appearance: Athletic build maintained despite years behind a desk. Brown hair going grey at the temples, worn in a practical braid. Face carries laugh lines and old scars in equal measure. Dresses in well-worn adventuring leathers even during administrative work — she says it reminds her what the job is actually about.

name: Brother Thane
role: Spiritual leader and final authority of the Returned. Interprets doctrine, accepts new members, guides the faithful toward 'readiness' for eventual Rift passage. Occasionally speaks prophecies that prove unsettlingly accurate. Rarely leaves the Cult House anymore.
location: Collapsed Plaza, the Cult House depths — the heart of the Returned's territory
appearance: Gaunt, almost skeletal, with skin that has a faint luminescent quality in dim light. Eyes are pale grey, almost white, and seem to look through rather than at people. Wears simple grey wrappings in the style his followers have adopted. Moves slowly and deliberately, as if moving through water. His voice is soft but carries in ways it shouldn't.

name: Elijah Blackhaven
role: Assists in scouting missions and acts as a liaison between the Guild and other factions.
location: The Marrow's Heart — The Rusty Anchor tavern
appearance: Tall and lean with a gaunt face, piercing blue eyes, and a scar running diagonally across his left cheek. He's always dressed in worn leather armor with a rusted steel sword at his side.

name: Gurth Ironbellow
role: Gurth works as a bouncer at The Rusty Axe, a tavern frequented by adventurers.
location: The Warrens, The Undercity's roughest district
appearance: Gurth is a towering half-orc with a scarred face and a thick, muscled frame. His eyes, a piercing ice blue, seem to hide a fierce determination.

name: Orion Swiftshadow
role: He spends his days gathering information, taking on minor contracts for the Guild, and searching for any clues that could lead him to his family.
location: The Silver Spire district, at the foot of the grand staircase
appearance: Orion is tall and lean, with piercing green eyes and a tangled mane of silver hair. His attire is a mix of worn adventurer's gear and a coat of midnight blue leather, adorned with silver runes that shimmer under the dim light.

name: Thrakkar Stonehollow
role: Thrakkar spends his days cataloguing and safeguarding the ancient texts of the Undercity.
location: Glass Sigil Archives, Lower Depths
appearance: Thrakkar is a towering, muscular dragonborn with scales as dark as obsidian. His horns are polished to a mirror-like sheen, and his eyes hold the wisdom of ages.

name: Isaac 'Ironhide' Gallows
role: Negotiates deals for the Iron Fang Consortium, often delving into the city's dangerous underbelly.
location: The Iron Quarter, Blacksmith's Alley
appearance: A hulking figure with scarred muscles, he carries a heavy burden with an air of quiet determination.

name: Zinnia Flamegrip
role: Zinnia spends her days scouting for potential missions, gathering information from her network of informants.
location: The Slums district, near the Guild's secret training facility
appearance: Zinnia is a wiry, battle-scarred kobold with a shock of fiery red hair and piercing green eyes. She carries herself with a quiet confidence, despite the constant tension in her shoulders.

name: Thaddeus 'Thunder' Arden
role: He takes on dangerous jobs and adventures for those who can afford his services, often using his connections with various factions to get things done.
location: The Rusted Spire, the heart of the Undercity
appearance: A broad-shouldered man with a scarred face and piercing blue eyes, he's often seen with a battered leather coat and a well-worn, silver-handled axe.

name: Elara Nightshadow
role: Elara spends her days researching forgotten lore in the vast libraries of the Wizards Tower.
location: Labyrinthine Quarter, Tower Library
appearance: With raven hair that falls past her shoulders, dark, piercing eyes, and a tall, slender frame, Elara Nightshadow exudes an air of mysterious grace. She often wears flowing robes embroidered with intricate magical symbols.

name: Skitter Ashscale
role: Assists in patrolling the Slums and maintains the equipment at the Warden's Forge.
history: [2026-04-10] A smuggled Rift shard fused with their palm, causing visions of the Tower Author...
location: Slums of the Ash District, near the Warden's Forge
appearance: Short and wiry, with scales the color of charred embers. Always seen with a machete strapped to his back.

name: Yuna Saltis
role: Performs high-value memory erasure contracts. Advises The Widow on complex cases. Occasionally consults on memory reconstruction (harder, less reliable, more expensive).
location: The Warrens, Obsidian Lotus secondary location (not the main house — she operates from a private room in the Night Pits)
appearance: Quiet in a way that feels engineered. Pale lavender skin, dark eyes with no visible iris differentiation. Wears gloves always — claims it's professional habit. Very short.

name: Alaric Vespera
role: He spends his days researching ancient texts and cataloguing new discoveries for the Glass Sigil library.
location: The Spire District – Archives of Eternity
appearance: Alaric is a lean, gaunt man with hollow eyes that seem to glow in the dark. He wears simple robes and carries an ancient parchment-bound book everywhere.

name: Jorick Sparrowthief
role: Jorick spends his days poring over ancient texts and scrolls, cataloguing and cross-referencing them for future use.
location: Sparrow's Nest, The Spires
appearance: Jorick is a small, wiry halfling with piercing green eyes that seem to miss nothing. He always wears a patchwork coat over his threadbare robes.

name: Korra Ironheart
role: Acting as a messenger and enforcer for the Iron Fang Consortium, Korra moves through the Undercity's dark underbelly with ease and purpose.
location: The Iron Pits district, Blackmarket sub-location
appearance: A towering Warforged with a patchwork of red and black, Korra Ironheart moves with a grace that belies her metallic frame. Her eyes, glowing yellow, seem to pierce through the shadows as she navigates the labyrinthine Undercity.

name: Kaelen Duskbane
role: Sells stolen gear and takes low-paying jobs guarding warehouses, using their knowledge of Undercity tunnels to smuggle contraband for richer Guild members.
location: Gutterbone District, Black Market Pawnshop
appearance: Silver-streaked black hair hangs in a messy ponytail, with amber eyes that flicker like dying embers. A thin scar runs from temple to jaw, and they carry themselves with gruff weariness, always checking their back for threats.

name: Kargath Stoneclaw
role: Smuggles stolen artifacts and sells forbidden knowledge to the highest bidder, using his Guild credentials to bypass security checkpoints.
location: Hollow Spine District, Black Market Undercroft
appearance: A jagged scar runs from his left eyebrow to his jawline, darkening the matted rust-red fur around his neck. His tusks are filed down to sharp points, and his eyes glow faintly amber in the dim light of the Black Market.

name: Vexar Scalefoot
role: Catalogs forbidden tomes and experiments with unstable magical phenomena in the Tower's restricted archives.
location: Lower Archives, Arcane Archives District
appearance: Small, with a wiry frame and mottled green-brown scales that shimmer like wet bark. His tail twitches nervously, betraying his anxiety, and his eyes are sharp, almost too intense for a Kobold.

name: Tessaly Orin
role: Documents adventurer career trajectories, maintains the fate archive index, assists Eir Velan with Thesaurus communication protocols.
location: Grand Forum Library, lower stacks (she has effectively colonised a section of the archive for her personal research project)
appearance: Ink-stained hands permanently. Wears reading lenses on a chain. Tends to mutter while working. Hair in a permanent state of being-just-put-up-or-just-taken-down.

name: Veyra Emberveil
role: Forges counterfeit relics and smuggles cult artifacts through the black market, using her elemental fire to melt down stolen metal into fake holy icons.
location: Smoldering Quarter, Ashen Foundry sub-district
appearance: Her ash-gray skin glows faintly with molten bronze veins, and her smoke-colored hair is braided with charred bone. She wears a patched leather apron stained with soot and arcane sigils, moving with the rigid precision of a soldier but the weary slouch of someone who’s seen too many graves.

name: Kippy Mucklefoot
role: Smuggles forbidden relics and corrupted scrolls through the Guild's underbelly, trading with black-market dealers in the Gutterpunk Quarter.
location: Gutterpunk Quarter, Iron Spine alleyways
appearance: Stocky frame with a mechanical leg forged from salvaged steel, his pale green eyes slit vertically like a feline's. He carries himself hunched, one hand always resting on a rusted dagger at his hip.

name: Varys Thornspire
role: Catalogs magical phenomena and experiments with rift energy, often working late in the archives with unstable containment chambers.
location: Arcane Warrens, Obsidian Archives
appearance: Silver-scaled with faint iridescence along their spine, a jagged scar runs from cheek to jaw. They carry themselves with a mix of arrogant confidence and nervous energy, twitching their tail constantly.

name: Lysandra Vane
role: She runs errands for the Guild, taking high-risk jobs to pay off debts while avoiding attention from the Tower Authority.
location: Hollow Spire district, Blackmarket Bazaar
appearance: Her silver-streaked hair is perpetually smudged with soot, and her skin glows faintly beneath a layer of ash she applies to mask it. She carries herself with a mix of confident swagger and weary resignation, as if she’s always one step away from being caught in a lie.

name: Kip Stonefang
role: Serves as a messenger and spy, navigating the treacherous Undercity to gather intel for the Patchwork Saints.
location: Shantytown Heights, Saints' Refuge tunnels — messenger, spy (secretly Thane's Cult)
appearance: A compact, wiry kobold with intricate, mosaic-like tattoos covering his scaleless body. He walks with a steady, determined gait, a worn leather satchel slung over his shoulder.

name: Eliana Veyra
role: Catalogs and maintains the Glass Sigil's archives, tracking rifts and lost souls, while secretly documenting the faction's hidden experiments on reality's fractures.
location: Shattered Spire, Archive Vaults
appearance: Pale skin etched with faint celestial runes, silver-streaked black hair tied back in a frayed bun. Their left eye glows faintly with an inner light, and they carry themselves with a weary slump, as though their bones ache from old wounds.

name: Thrain Deepforge
role: He coordinates shipments of rare reagents for the Choir's rituals and acts as a liaison between the Bazaar's merchants and the Choir's enforcers.
location: Ashen Quarter, Black Market Bazaar
appearance: Broad-shouldered with a scar across his brow from a failed ritual, his beard is streaked with ash-gray despite his youth. He wears a tunic dyed in serpent-scale patterns, frayed at the edges from years of hauling goods through the Black Market Bazaar.

name: Tink Mallek
role: Tink spends their days repairing rift-sealing gear and assisting in minor containment operations, eager to prove their worth.
location: Smoldering Quarter, in a derelict workshop repurposed as a Warden outpost
appearance: Tink's small frame is covered in patchwork leather armor reinforced with brass plating, their hands always stained with grease and soot. They move with a restless energy, eyes darting between the shadows as if expecting something to explode at any moment.

name: Elaris Moonshadow
role: Specializes in smuggling forbidden texts and sabotage of rival factions' operations, using their knowledge of the Undercity's hidden tunnels.
location: Guttervein District, Iron Lung sub-location
appearance: Silver-streaked black hair is cropped short with a jagged scar running through the left side of their scalp. Their right cheek bears a tattoo of a serpent coiled around a dagger, faded from years of scrubbing it with ash.

name: Finnick Tinkersong
role: Scavenges forgotten tech, repairs enchanted gear, and runs errands for Guild captains in exchange for scraps of information.
location: Guttervein's Black Market, beneath the rusted scaffolding of the Iron Fang's abandoned warehouse
appearance: Slender frame with ink-stained fingers and a patchwork cloak stitched from scavenged leather. His left ear is cropped short, leaving a jagged scar that curves toward his temple.

name: Dain Veythor
role: Enforces Tower Authority regulations, conducts raids on unlicensed adventuring parties, and reports dissent to higher ranks.
location: Ironspire District, Compliance Enforcement Bureau
appearance: Obsidian-black scales shimmer with faint silver markings along their horns, which curve sharply backward like broken blades. Their tail is wrapped tightly around one leg, a habit from years of suppressing restlessness.

name: Thrain Ironwound
role: Thrain serves as a scout and intelligence gatherer, venturing into the more dangerous parts of the Undercity to gather information.
location: The Iron Quarter, Argent Blades Fortress
appearance: Thrain is a burly dwarf with a thick beard braided into intricate patterns, and a scar that runs down his left cheek. He carries himself with a grim determination, always ready for action.

name: Elyndor Mournshade
role: Tends to the wounded and distributes supplies, often working in the shadows to gather rare ingredients for the cure.
location: Hollow Spire's Lower Reaches, in a makeshift clinic run by the Patchwork Saints.
appearance: Silver-streaked hair and violet eyes, carries themselves with weary determination, their hands often stained with ink from transcribing prayers.

name: Lirael Veythari
role: She works as a smuggler's runner, moving contraband through the Bazaar's labyrinthine alleys while subtly gathering intel for the Choir.
location: Guttervein District, Ashen Bazaar
appearance: Lirael has pointed elf ears and a slender frame, her skin etched with faint, iridescent scales that shimmer like wet obsidian under the Dome's flickering lights. Her eyes are a piercing gold, and she carries herself with a quiet, coiled tension, always watching, always listening.

name: Director Myra Kess
role: Final authority on all FTA operations — licensing, compliance, Rift response coordination, inter-faction mediation. Commands the FTA's limited enforcement resources. Manages the political relationships that keep the Undercity from tearing itself apart.
location: The Tower proper, upper administrative levels — the official seat of FTA power
appearance: Sharp features, close-cropped dark hair, always in formal FTA uniform. Moves with efficient precision. Her expression rarely changes — she's mastered the administrator's neutral face that reveals nothing. Small reading glasses she only wears in private. Hands show calluses from weapons training she still maintains.

name: Grak Ironfist
role: Scouts for the Argent Blades, gathering intel on rival factions and unmarked tombs while secretly documenting cracks in the Dome's barriers.
location: Ironworks District, Lower Forge
appearance: A jagged scar crosses his brow from a past battle, and his tusks are chipped despite years of grinding metal. His eyes are a sharp, unnatural green, and he carries himself with a mix of confidence and weariness, as though every step risks collapsing beneath him.

name: Kaelan Veyth
role: Sifts through black-market deals and corpse-laden cargo holds to extract valuable relics, negotiating with smugglers while evading both rival factions and the Consortium's own enforcers.
secret: The Emberheart is not a relic but a sentient shard of a fallen god, which has been whispering promises of power to Kaelan since they were a child—promises they've started to believe.
location: Smoldering Wards, Iron Maw scrap yard
appearance: Obsidian-scaled arms scarred with faint glowing runes, amber eyes that flicker like dying embers. Drapes a frayed cloak over a body built for hauling stolen goods, shoulders hunched from years of bending to smugglers' demands.
motivation: Seeks a shattered relic called the Emberheart to protect their younger sister from Tower Authority hunters, but fears the artifact's corrupting power might destroy everything they care about.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a storm of conflicting loyalties brewing—a dragonborn bound to a relic that remembers its own murder, with a sister's fate hanging on a choice between salvation and damnation.
relationships: Maintains a fragile alliance with smuggler Jorin 'the Maw's Mouth' despite suspecting he's using them to funnel goods to the Wardens of Ash. Secretly mourns the brother the Consortium executed for refusing to deliver a soul-harvesting artifact.

name: Klikk Scrapweaver
role: Transcribes cursed scrolls into usable formulas while secretly testing their stability in the workshop's subterranean vaults.
secret: Once a blade-singer for Brother Thane's Cult, Klikk smuggled ritual texts to the Guild to atone for slaughtering scribes during the Purge, but the scrolls now whisper of a hidden Tower chamber.
location: Ashen Quarter, Forged-Steel Workshop
appearance: Scarred knuckles from ink-stained fingers and a patchwork cloak stitched from torn spellscrolls, eyes gleam with a permanent film of soot from handling ancient texts.
motivation: Wants to prove goblins can be more than scavengers by mastering forbidden knowledge, but fears their past as a cult assassin will ruin their future.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a lingering curse from Thane's rituals binding Klikk's soul to the Tower's foundations, threatening to unravel both the Guild and the Dome itself.
relationships: Mentored by a disillusioned archivist who knows their past, but secretly spied on by a rival initiate from the Serpent Choir seeking the same forbidden knowledge.

name: Veyra Duskhollow
role: She brokers black-market deals in the Docks, using her knowledge of the Undercity’s underbelly to navigate its dangers.
secret: She is secretly the last surviving bloodline of the Duskhollow elves, a clan wiped out by the Iron Fang Consortium’s experiments.
location: Docks, Iron Maw
appearance: Her silver hair is streaked with ash, and her eyes glow faintly amber. She moves with the weary grace of one who has seen too much, her posture rigidly upright despite the weight of secrets.
motivation: She seeks a lost artifact that can undo a past betrayal, hoping to atone for the lives she’s taken. Her true goal is to break free from the cycle of vengeance that has bound her for decades.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a lingering curse from her clan’s experiments, a shadow that could either save or destroy the Undercity if unleashed.
relationships: She maintains a fragile truce with the Guild of Ashen Scrolls, who know her true heritage but demand her silence in exchange for protection.

name: Elias Vorne
role: Transcribes ancient incantations and tends to the Tower’s volatile spell archives, often working late into the smog-choked nights.
secret: He’s not an apprentice—he’s a former adventurer exiled for using black-market magic, and the Tower’s archives hide his past crimes.
location: Arcanum District, LowerScript Archive
appearance: Gaunt face etched with ink-stained hands, his threadbare robe fraying at the cuffs. He carries himself with the brittle arrogance of someone who’s spent too many nights hunched over forbidden texts.
motivation: Elias craves validation from the senior magi, but his true drive is to unlock a forgotten spell that could save his sister’s life—no matter the cost.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a storm of unspent power in his veins, a reckoning tied to the sister he abandoned years ago.
relationships: Mentored by Archivist Mira Solen, but secretly spied on by the Adventurers Guild, who suspect his true loyalties.

name: Seraphine Duskveil
role: Monitors rift activity in the Smoldering Stairwell, leading patrols to seal unstable tears in reality, and interrogates captured adventurers for intel.
secret: Seraphine is actually the daughter of a fallen god, her celestial heritage a curse that makes her a prime candidate for soul-harvesting. She faked her parents' deaths to escape their divine obligations.
location: Ashen Quarter, Smoldering Stairwell
appearance: Her left eye glows with a faint, sickly gold hue, veins of starlight tracing her temples like faded tattoos. She wears a patched charcoal cloak stained with ash and burns a constant cigarette between her fingers, though the smoke dissipates into nothingness.
motivation: She wants to atone for the rift that consumed her sister years ago, but fears her own celestial blood might make her a target for the gods harvesting souls. She secretly believes the Wardens are complicit in the city's decay.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a lingering corruption in her divine bloodline and a desperate hope that her sister's soul might still be trapped in a rift somewhere.
relationships: She secretly communicates with a defector from the Adventurers Guild who supplies her with forbidden knowledge. The Tower Authority views her as a liability and has tried to reassign her twice.

name: Alaric Stonemason
secret: His past identity as a feared enforcer for the Argent Blades is unknown to his fellow Blades.
history: [2026-03-11] Succumbed to injuries. Faction: Argent Blades, Rank: Blade.
[2026-03-28] Doppelganger sighting — someone impersonating Alaric Stonemason spotted in the Undercity.
[2026-04-11] RETURNED FROM DEATH as Specter. drained of color and warmth, phases through walls, drains life from anyone who lingers too close.
appearance: A lean, battle-hardened man with a scar running down his left cheek, and a signature Argent Blades blade sheathed at his side.
motivation: Unfinished business from before death. Driven by hunger for what they lost.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a deep conflict within Alaric, a man who fights for justice while carrying the weight of his own transgressions. Returned from death as Specter. Changed. Dangerous. The Oracle watches with great interest.
relationships: Maintains a strained but necessary alliance with the Iron Fang Consortium, who are unaware of his double-agency.

name: Grover Ironfoot
secret: Unbeknownst to the Iron Fang Consortium, Grover is secretly working with the Wardens of Ash to gather intelligence on the Consortium's operations, hoping to betray them and take control of the city's black market.
history: [2026-03-16] Killed. Faction: Iron Fang Consortium, Rank: Acquisition Agent.
[2026-03-26] Doppelganger sighting — someone impersonating Grover Ironfoot spotted in the Undercity.
[2026-04-05] Doppelganger sighting — someone impersonating Grover Ironfoot spotted in the Undercity.
[2026-04-10] RETURNED FROM DEATH as Ghost. translucent, flickering, trapped between the city and whatever comes after.
appearance: Grover stands at an imposing height for a halfling, his sturdy frame adorned with a leather jacket and a patchwork of Iron Fang emblems. A scar runs down his left cheek, a battle scar earned during a particularly dangerous acquisition.
motivation: Unfinished business from before death. Driven by hunger for what they lost.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a hidden ambition and a heart heavy with loss within Grover Ironfoot, a man poised on the precipice of power. Returned from death as Ghost. Changed. Dangerous. The Oracle watches with great interest.
relationships: Grover maintains a tense alliance with Zippy Quickclaw, the leader of the Patchwork Saints, who owes Grover a significant debt.

name: Kaelen Veyth
role: Drafts and verifies contracts for the Serpent Choir, ensuring they’re legally sound while subtly altering terms to shield their sister from the organization’s risks.
location: Guttervein District, Undercroft Archive
appearance: Scaly obsidian skin with faint golden patterns resembling coiled serpents, a scar running from cheek to chin. Their fingers are perpetually stained with ink, and they carry themselves with a hunched posture, as if bracing for a blow.
motivation: Kaelen wants to protect their younger sister from the Choir’s dangerous contracts, but fears their own complicity in the organization’s crimes. They secretly hope to redeem their past by exposing the Choir’s corruption.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a lingering connection to the Guild of Ashen Scrolls and a hidden power tied to their dragonblood heritage, which could either save or destroy the Choir’s secrets.
relationships: Close to their sister, who works as a smuggler in the Black Market, and has a tense, veiled rivalry with the Choir’s enforcer, Thrain Ironwound.

name: Kaelen Duskhorn
role: Kaelen scouts forgotten tunnels and trades in rare artifacts, using his knowledge of the Undercity's secrets to survive.
secret: He is secretly a former exorcist who betrayed the Serpent Choir to save his brother, now hunted by both the Choir and the gods for his heresy.
location: Guttervein, Iron Needle Tavern
appearance: Kaelen has a tail that curls tightly around his wrist, a habit from years of gripping weapons. His eyes are a sharp amber, always scanning for threats, and his skin bears faint scars from failed exorcisms.
motivation: Kaelen seeks to escape the Guild's disdain for kobolds by earning respect through covert ops, but his true goal is to find a cure for his brother's cursed soul, stolen by the gods.
oracle_notes: The Oracle sees Kaelen's soul as a fractured mirror, reflecting the cost of defying divine and mortal powers alike.
relationships: Kaelen maintains a fragile alliance with a human smuggler who provides him with forbidden relics, but the smuggler suspects his true allegiance.

name: Ignacia Vitreous
role: She catalogs forbidden texts and decrypts old case files, carefully erasing traces of her own reckless history while hunting for a way to undo the curse she accidentally bound to herself.
secret: The relic she stole—a shard of the Tower’s original seal—is embedded in her spine, its magic slowly corrupting her body. Every time she touches a restricted archive, the curse grows stronger.
location: Shattered Archives, Hollow Spire District
appearance: Her crimson horns are etched with faint glass patterns, and her tail ends in a cracked, gemstone-like tip. She wears a soot-stained leather apron over a tunic stained with ink and old blood, moving with the slow precision of someone who’s spent years hunched over brittle tomes.
motivation: She wants to prove the Glass Sigil’s records are untampered, but secretly fears the archives hold evidence of her past as an adventurer who stole a cursed relic. She’s desperate to erase that mistake before it destroys her again.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a storm of fractured truths—her body is a prison for a power that could shatter the Dome, but her soul is already broken by the weight of what she’s hidden.
relationships: She’s tolerated by her mentor, Archivist Moris Vey, who suspects her odd behavior but never asks questions. The Guild of Ashen Scrolls quietly tracks her, hoping to reclaim the relic she stole.

name: Elara Veyne
role: She sorts through magical artifacts in the Tower’s vaults by day and runs a shadow trade in unstable reagents by night.
secret: Elara is actually the daughter of the first Archmage who vanished during the Tower’s founding, and she’s been hiding her bloodline to avoid being hunted by the Tower’s own enforcers.
location: Gilded Hollow, Arcane Bazaar
appearance: Her charcoal-gray cloak is frayed at the hem from hauling crates, and her left eye bears a faint scar from a failed alchemy experiment. She carries herself with the hunched posture of someone who’s spent years hunched over smoldering sigils.
motivation: She wants to prove she’s more than her family’s disgrace—a line of failed enchanters who died in the Tower’s early days. She secretly hopes to redeem her name by mastering the forbidden art of soul-binding.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a flicker of ancient magic in her veins and a reckoning tied to the Tower’s original sin—a sacrifice she’s prepared to repeat.
relationships: Her mentor, Magister Caelum, knows her secret but keeps it buried out of fear of rebellion. She’s also secretly in debt to a smuggler who wants her to steal a cursed relic from the Serpent Choir.

name: Pip Wrenthorn
role: Smuggles forbidden relics between the Docks and the Cult’s sanctum, bribing guards with stolen arcane components.
secret: He is the halfling who accidentally tore a rift in the Undercity’s foundation years ago, drawing the Cult’s attention to his family. His sister is the only one who knows the true location of the rift’s epicenter.
location: Docks of Black Maw, The Hollow Gauge
appearance: Wiry frame with pale, ink-stained fingers and a jagged scar running from his temple to his jaw. Wears a patchwork coat stitched from scavenged leather, its collar folded over a scarred collarbone.
motivation: Wants to save his sister from being used as a sacrifice, but fears the Cult will kill her if he tries to flee. Believes Brother Thane’s rituals can resurrect the dead, and he’s desperate to bring back his mother, lost to a rift.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a flicker of unstable power in his palms—echoes of the rift he unleashed, still trying to bind itself to his mortal form.
relationships: Spied on by the Glass Sigil, who suspect his smuggling routes fund Cult activities. Has a tense alliance with a Warden of Ash who once saved his sister from a rogue adventurer.

name: Grom Vulgarn
secret: "In the Undercity, the shadow of the Lich King has granted me an unnatural second life, but at a cost - I now bear a fragment of his icy essence within me, causing strange, frozen auras to emanate from my being."
history: [2026-04-03] Succumbed to injuries. Faction: Argent Blades, Rank: Senior Blade.
[2026-04-11] RESURRECTED via Tower Fund Me campaign. Weakened but alive.
appearance: Grom stands tall with scarred muscles and a crooked nose, his eyes often hidden behind dark sunglasses. He carries a long sword and a pair of brass knuckles, ready for any fight.
motivation: Grom seeks to prove his worth to the Argent Blades, driven by a fierce determination to atone for his past mistakes.
oracle_notes: The Oracle senses a deep-seated turmoil within Grom, a struggle between loyalty and ambition. Recently resurrected — disoriented, weakened, and carrying the weight of what they saw on the other side.
relationships: He maintains a tense truce with the Wardens of Ash due to their shared interest in keeping the city safe.
